name: searchNotes
description: Searches the full text of all markdown files in the Obsidian vault for a query string. Returns matching lines with their file path and line number. Case-insensitive by default (set caseSensitive: true to override). Use this to find notes about a topic without knowing the filename.

query.description: Text to search for across all notes

caseSensitive.description: Whether the search is case-sensitive (default: false)
